identities.name: Dimensional Analysis - Constant Derivation
identities.logic: Deriving dimensions of physical constants (Stefan's constant, Planck's constant, etc.) and checking dimensional homogeneity of equations.

identities.name: Current Electricity - Circuit Analysis
identities.logic: Kirchhoff's laws in complex circuits, Wheatstone bridge balance conditions, and potentiometer applications.

identities.name: Capacitance - Series/Parallel Combinations
identities.logic: Energy stored in capacitors, dielectric effects, and redistribution of charge when capacitors are connected.

identities.name: Semiconductor - PN Junction Diodes
identities.topic: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits
identities.logic: Forward/reverse bias, depletion region, logic gates (NAND/NOR as universal gates), and transistor configurations.

identities.name: Ray Optics - Lens/Mirror Formula Applications
identities.logic: Sign conventions in lens/mirror formula, lens immersed in medium (refractive index effects), and lens maker's formula.

identities.name: Magnetism - Force on Moving Charges
identities.logic: Lorentz force, cyclotron motion, magnetic force on current-carrying conductor, and torque on current loop.

identities.name: AC Circuits - Impedance Calculations
identities.logic: LCR circuits, resonance conditions, power factor, and phasor diagrams for AC circuits.

identities.name: Rotational Motion - Moment of Inertia
identities.topic: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
identities.logic: Parallel/perpendicular axis theorems, torque-angular acceleration relationship, and rolling motion.

identities.name: Photoelectric Effect - Einstein's Equation
identities.topic: Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter
identities.logic: Work function, threshold frequency, stopping potential, and kinetic energy of photoelectrons.

identities.name: Electromagnetic Waves - Properties
identities.logic: Speed of EM waves in different media, wavelength-frequency relationships, and EM spectrum characteristics.

identities.name: Electrostatics - Gauss's Law Applications
identities.logic: Electric field due to infinite sheet, charged sphere (conducting/non-conducting), and cylindrical charge distributions.

identities.name: Wave Optics - Interference Patterns
identities.logic: Young's double slit, fringe width, path difference, and coherent sources.

identities.name: Thermodynamics - First Law Applications
identities.logic: PV diagrams, work done in cyclic/non-cyclic processes, and isothermal vs adiabatic processes.

identities.name: Modern Physics - Atomic Models
identities.logic: Bohr's model, energy levels, spectral lines (Balmer/Lyman series), and de Broglie wavelength.

identities.name: Gravitation - Orbital Mechanics
identities.logic: Kepler's laws, escape velocity, gravitational potential energy, and satellite motion.

identities.name: SHM - Energy Conservation
identities.logic: Total energy in SHM, kinetic-potential energy exchange, and time period calculations.

identities.name: Electromagnetic Induction - Faraday's Law
identities.logic: Induced EMF, Lenz's law direction, motional EMF, and self/mutual inductance.

identities.name: Kinetic Theory - Gas Laws
identities.logic: Ideal gas equation, kinetic energy-temperature relationship, and RMS velocity.

identities.name: Mechanics - Work-Energy Theorem
identities.logic: Work done by variable forces, conservation of mechanical energy, and power calculations.

identities.name: Mechanics - Collision Analysis
identities.logic: Elastic vs inelastic collisions, coefficient of restitution, and momentum conservation.

identities.name: Nuclear Physics - Radioactive Decay
identities.logic: Decay law, half-life, alpha/beta/gamma decay, and binding energy per nucleon.

identities.name: Communication Systems - Modulation
identities.logic: AM/FM modulation, bandwidth, and modulation index.

identities.name: Fluid Mechanics - Bernoulli's Theorem
identities.logic: Equation of continuity, Bernoulli's equation applications, and Torricelli's theorem.

identities.name: Thermal Properties - Heat Transfer
identities.logic: Conduction, convection, radiation, and thermal conductivity in series/parallel.

identities.name: Waves - Sound Properties
identities.logic: Doppler effect, beats, resonance in pipes, and velocity of sound in different media.

identities.name: Magnetic Materials - Hysteresis
identities.logic: Diamagnetic, paramagnetic, ferromagnetic materials, and magnetic susceptibility.

identities.name: Kinematics - Projectile Motion
identities.logic: Range, maximum height, time of flight, and trajectory equation for projectile motion.

identities.name: Circular Motion - Centripetal Force
identities.logic: Banking of roads, conical pendulum, and centrifugal force in rotating frames.

identities.name: Wave Optics - Polarization
identities.logic: Malus law, Brewster's angle, and polarization by reflection/refraction.

identities.name: Resolution - Rayleigh Criterion
identities.logic: Resolving power of microscope/telescope, limit of resolution, and wavelength dependency.

traps.name: Sign Convention Errors
traps.description: Mixing up sign conventions in optics (lens/mirror formulas) or forgetting negative signs in potential energy.

traps.name: Unit Confusion
traps.description: Not converting units consistently (e.g., cm to m, eV to Joules) leading to wrong numerical answers.

traps.name: Vector vs Scalar Confusion
traps.description: Treating vector quantities as scalars (e.g., current vs current density, force vs pressure).

traps.name: Formula Misapplication
traps.description: Using formulas outside their valid range (e.g., applying ideal gas law to real gases at high pressure).

traps.name: Conservation Law Violations
traps.description: Forgetting to check if conditions for conservation (momentum, energy) are met before applying them.
